# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We provide security updates for the current major release of Sentio Systems.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
The Sentio Systems team takes security vulnerabilities seriously. We appreciate your efforts to responsibly disclose your findings.

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Instead, please report them via email to: **security@sentio-systems.com** (or reach out to the project maintainer directly if this address is inactive).

Please include:
- Type of vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact

We will respond to your report as promptly as possible and work with you to remediate the vulnerability securely.
